title: Caldera - SMB Lateral Movement via Impacket from Linux
description: Detects use of Impacket tools (psexec.py, smbexec.py, wmiexec.py) from Linux hosts for lateral movement to Windows targets. Caldera T1021.002 emulation leverages Impacket to authenticate over SMB and execute commands on Windows systems within the GOAD AD lab network.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*psexec.py*' or msg like '*smbexec.py*' or msg like '*wmiexec.py*' or msg like '*atexec.py*')) or ((msg like '*impacket*' or msg like '*smbclient.py*' or msg like '*secretsdump.py*')) or ((msg like '*-target-ip*' or msg like '*-dc-ip*' or msg like '*SMBDomain*')))
falsepositives: AD administrators using Impacket for administrative tasks
